name: Terminate Session
description:
End the current session. Use when:
- All requested work is complete
- User explicitly requests session end
- Unrecoverable error prevents further progress

Unlike communicate and delegate which yield control temporarily, this tool ends the session permanently.

reason.description:
Why the session is ending:
- complete: All requested work finished successfully
- user_requested: User explicitly asked to end session
- error: Unrecoverable error prevents further progress
- blocked: Cannot proceed without human intervention that won't come

summary.description: Brief summary of session outcome - what was accomplished, what remains undone if any

artifacts_produced.description: IDs of artifacts produced during session
